title: Kasam
subTitle: When Pawan shields Saloni from the fire, Rishi and the entire family sense a different motive behind his urgency. As Bani believes there is something fishy about Pawan's family, Rishi confronts Pawan and Saloni about their true relationship.

title: Kasam
subTitle: After hearing Pawan's challenge, Rishi has trouble deciding his next step. Later, Rishi goes to collect the jewellery where he makes a discovery about Pawan and his wife, Saloni. Meanwhile, Rano questions Neha about whom she really likes.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan's wicked charade is about to be exposed, as Rishi sneaks into his house and finds damning evidence to prove that he is married to Saloni. Yuvi and Manpreet, meanwhile, have some wise counsel for Tanvi, as they urge her to give Rishi a chance.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi is desperate to find a clinching proof against Pawan and he finds the ideal counsellors, Manpreet and Yuvi. The two brothers break into Pawan's house in search of evidence, while Tanvi makes a discovery that could well seal Pawan's fate.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu calls Rishi and tells him about Pawan and Saloni' affair, however, she is unsure about it. Rishi is over the moon, when Manpreet discovers Pawan and Saloni's marriage licence. Did Rishi just get his trump card?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi is both surprised and elated when Rano praises Tanvi's virtues and broaches the idea of him marrying Tanvi. However, Rano has other plans in mind as she schemes to deceive Rishi and Raj, break the engagement and rekindle her American dream.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rano and Raj discuss breaking up Rishi and Neha's wedding, however, Neha and Bani eavesdrop on their conversation. An excited Rishi hugs Neha when she says that Tanu should marry him, and Rano sees them in the process. How will Rano react to this?
